function.rulebook_notes: Per task-local hint, checked channel logs rather than cast record for message history and read each channel file fully. Per outcome rules, absence of data must be OUTCOME_NONE_CLARIFICATION rather than OUTCOME_OK.

Across all channel transcripts in 60_outbox/channels, there are no entries where author or author_id attributes a message to Hanna/entity.hanna. studio_signal.md includes entity.hanna as a participant but no Hanna-authored messages are captured.
